backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a calorie tracker backend with food entry CRUD, step logging, calorie limits, and daily summary calculations, using persistent List and Map collections with blob storage support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (food entries without `id`, no calorie limits map) into the new schema by deriving `id` from `foodName` and initializing an empty `calorieLimitsMap`.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features—food entry deletion with live summary refresh, calorie limit input with remaining-calories display, and a 7-day calorie history chart—along with their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and key contents of every component, hook, page, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind layers and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, sidebar, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Personal Calorie Tracker' that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with four routes (root redirect, /dashboard, /upload, /history) wrapped in a persistent Layout shell.
frontend/src/components/FoodEntryCard.ts: Card component displaying a food log entry's thumbnail, name, date, and calorie badge, with an optional trash-icon delete button that shows a spinner while deletion is in progress.
frontend/src/components/ImageDropzone.ts: Drag-and-drop image upload component with drag-over visual feedback, click-to-browse fallback, image preview with a clear button, and image-only file type validation.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app shell with a sticky header, desktop nav, mobile bottom nav, and footer, using TanStack Router for active link detection.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a labeled stat value with an optional icon, unit, subtitle, and color variant (default, success, warning, danger, info).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity auth context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering food entries, daily summaries, steps, available dates, and seven-day history with appropriate cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main daily dashboard page showing food entries, calorie stats, step logging, calorie limit management, and a 7-day bar chart for a selected date, with navigation between days.
frontend/src/pages/FoodUpload.tsx: Multi-step food upload page that accepts an image file, generates a client-side calorie estimate from the filename, lets the user review/edit the food name and calories, then saves the entry to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: History log page that lists all tracked dates sorted newest-first with per-day calorie summaries and an overall average stats card, with click-through navigation to the dashboard for each date.
frontend/src/utils/calorieEstimator.ts: Client-side utility that estimates calories and suggests a food name by matching image filename keywords against a hardcoded food-calorie database, with a file-size-based portion multiplier.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, fonts, chart colors, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) describing the calorie tracker app's summary, existing implemented features, architectural notes, and known issues for build planning.
